name: Container Registry admin user account enabled
description: The built-in admin user account is enabled on this Azure Container Registry. The admin account has full access to the registry using a shared username and password. Shared credentials cannot be individually audited, rotated per-user, or subject to MFA.
remediation: Disable the admin user account. Use Azure RBAC with service principals or managed identities for CI/CD pipelines, and user-assigned managed identities for AKS pull access. Assign the AcrPull or AcrPush roles as needed.
